title.en: However, they are all bound to obtain the fruit...

content.en:
"Naturally, it is snatched by virtue of ability, but these primordial antiquities are also a big trouble!"

The half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor of the Xinggu Chamber of Commerce opened his mouth and said.

Many Dao Ancestors nodded slightly, there were not only the Three Qing Dao Fruits here, but also dozens of primordial antiquities comparable to the Sevenfold Origin Ancestors sleeping here.

If you observe with the will of the Extreme Dao, you can't observe anything, and you can use the ancient occult arts to perceive the existence of these primordial antiquities.

It's also that their strength is extremely strong, and they can leapfrog and fight against the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor, so they are not afraid of these primordial antiquities, but these primordial artifacts are also big troubles, and they can't be easily got rid of.

However, they are all bound to obtain the fruit of the Three Clearings.

The Sanqing Dao Fruit is an incomparably rare treasure that can be refined into a clone, even for the Sevenfold Ancestor.

Of course, the clone condensed with the Three Qing Dao Fruits is just a one-time clone, although it can be cultivated, but once it falls, then there will be none.

Unless you can continue to refine the clone with the Three Qing Dao Fruits.

Although there can only be a clone of one life, it is equivalent to one more life for them.

For a half-step sevenfold ancestor or sevenfold ancestor who can't have a clone, the value of this one doppelganger is too great!

In addition, the doppelganger refined by the Sanqing Dao Fruit will also have a high level of comprehension, and the speed of comprehending the Yuan Dao will be faster.

Therefore, the value of the Sanqing Dao fruit is too high.

If it was in the outside world, the Seven Primordial Ancestors would have to fight like crazy for this.

Another period of time passed, and the Sanqing Dao Fruit finally fully ripened.

"Do it!"

One Dao Ancestor made a move.

Just as they were approaching the Three Qing Dao Fruits, those primordial artifacts comparable to the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestors appeared, revealing their true bodies one by one.

However, when they saw these primordial antiquities, these half-step sevenfold ancestors looked shocked one by one, and immediately showed a look of great joy.

"Primordial Reincarnation Stone !!"

"Oh my God, the Primordial Reincarnation Stone was born here, and there are so many of them!"

"It seems that there was a primordial reincarnation stone in the last session, and this time there are so many!"

"The value of the Primordial Reincarnation Stone is incomparably huge, as long as you kill the Primordial Reincarnation Stone, you can obtain its shell. The shell of this primordial antiquity can be refined into a reincarnation treasure, which can be used to reincarnate and reincarnate, although it is not as good as the naturally born reincarnation treasure, but the effect is not much worse!"

"The value of one Primordial Reincarnation Stone is comparable to the entire net worth of an ordinary Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor!"

At this moment, these half-step sevenfold ancestors were extremely excited in their hearts, not only fighting the idea of these Three Qing Dao Fruits, but also the idea of these primordial reincarnation stones.

"Snatch the Three Qing Dao Fruits first, and then deal with these primordial reincarnation stones!"

Thundered!!!

The battle begins!

These half-step sevenfold ancestors not only fought with these primordial reincarnation stones, but also fought with each other, after all, there were only eight Sanqing Dao fruits, where was there enough points!

Soon.

These Sanqing Dao Fruits were snatched up, and the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor who did not capture the Sanqing Dao Fruit was naturally in a very bad mood.

But because there was an agreement before, it was natural that it could not be snatched again.

Therefore, their goal is to target these primordial reincarnation stones.

However, the strength of these primordial reincarnation stones is not weak, so the battle will not end so quickly.

Soon, the battle here attracted the attention of many Dao Ancestors, and they came over one by one.

As soon as some Dao Ancestors saw that it was a primordial antiquity Primordial Reincarnation Stone comparable to the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor, they were directly frightened and fled, no matter how precious the Primordial Reincarnation Stone was, it was not something they could participate in!

However, there were still many Dao Ancestors who were ready to move, watching around, and did not leave here.

......

At this time, Ye Tian also came here.

"Primordial Reincarnation Stone!"

Ye Tian also noticed the Primordial Reincarnation Stone, and was a little surprised, this is a good thing!

A reincarnation treasure made of an Primordial Reincarnation Stone, if complete, is enough for a half-step sevenfold primordial ancestor to reincarnate and rebuild.

Of course, if it is a sevenfold primordial ancestor, I am afraid that it will take a lot of primordial reincarnation stones to create a reincarnation treasure that can be reincarnated and recultivated.

In the Xuanyu Pavilion, there was a powerful Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor who was buying the Primordial Reincarnation Stone, and the price given was incomparably high.

"The value of the Primordial Reincarnation Stone is very high, but it's a pity that my strength is not enough to deal with the Primordial Reincarnation Stone!"

Ye Tian didn't choose to do it, and he was also waiting.

Bang!!!

A primordial reincarnation stone was knocked away, and its body was cracked, as if it was about to be killed.

At this time, a half-step sevenfold ancestor seemed to have broken the boundary of forty-five times, thinking that his strength was good, and directly attacked the primordial reincarnation stone, as if he wanted to pick up the leak.

Bang!!!

The primordial reincarnation stone was attacked and was directly cracked open, but it still did not die.

"Look for death!"

A half-step sevenfold ancestor who had comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao was furious, and there were other Dao Ancestors who dared to snatch their prey.

In an instant, the half-step sevenfold ancestor who wanted to pick up the leak was directly shattered by a blow in the air, and if it weren't for the primordial ancient bead, I am afraid that he would be killed directly.

"Canggu Dao Ancestor, I didn't want to snatch it, I just intercepted it for you, for the sake of the face of the Blood River Palace, let me go!"

This half-step sevenfold ancestor begged for mercy.

Canggu Daozu hesitated for a moment and did not make a move.

And among the many Dao Ancestors who attacked the Primordial Reincarnation Stone, there was the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor of the Blood River Palace.

"Canggu Dao Ancestor, give me a face, let go of this Dao Ancestor of my Blood River Palace!" said the Dao Ancestor of the Blood River Hall who had comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao.

Seeing this, Canggu Daozu snorted coldly and did not continue to shoot.

However, just when everyone thought that this fast-dying primordial reincarnation stone was not snatched by other Dao Ancestors, Ye Tian made a move.

I saw Ye Tian appear beside the Primordial Reincarnation Stone, and his right hand, which emitted golden light, pinched the Primordial Reincarnation Stone, killed it with one blow, and took away the body.

This scene happened so quickly that the other Dao Ancestors were stunned.

At this time, there are still Dao Ancestors who dare to snatch food from the tiger's mouth and not give Canggu Dao Ancestor face?

"Boy, you're looking for death!"

Canggu Daozu was furious.

A half-step sevenfold ancestor who had only broken the boundary more than twenty times dared to snatch the primordial reincarnation stone that he had suffered so much.

He has comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, and he has broken the boundary more than seventy times, how terrifying his strength is.

In terms of strength, Ye Tian is indeed not the opponent of Canggu Dao Ancestor, but Cang Gu Dao Ancestor can't kill him now.

"Nine Ancient Blood Fingers!"

Canggu Dao Ancestor shattered Ye Tian's body with one finger.

However, under the effect of the Immortal Yuan Dao Ancestor Fu and an ordinary Primordial Ancient Pearl, Ye Tian recovered in an instant.

Attacked again and again, Ye Tian did not die again and again.

Moreover, Ye Tian kept fleeing, leaving Canggu Dao Ancestor helpless.

"Canggu Dao Ancestor, you have been chasing and killing me like this, those primordial reincarnation stones will not have your share!" Ye Tian kindly reminded.

"Boy, which force are you from?"

Canggu Dao Ancestor asked.

"Xuanyu Pavilion!"

Ye Tian didn't hide it, and said it generously.

Anyway, with his speed of progress, he will soon be able to catch up with the Canggu Dao Ancestor.

"It turned out to be the Dao Ancestor of Xuanyu Pavilion, and the next time I meet you, I will definitely make you look good!"

Canggu Dao Ancestor retreated and went to hunt down the other primordial reincarnation stones.

"This time it's good, I got the shell of a primordial reincarnation stone, even if I don't need it, I can sell it for a sky-high price!"

Immediately, Ye Tian left this area.

After all, he was lucky this time, and it was almost impossible for him to obtain such a primordial reincarnation stone body again.

If you have this time, you might as well go somewhere else!
